scripts.pre-deploy: npm run lint && npm run build
scripts.release:patch: npm run changelog && npm version patch && git add CHANGELOG.md && git commit -m 'chore: update changelog' && git push origin main --tags
scripts.release:minor: npm run changelog && npm version minor && git add CHANGELOG.md && git commit -m 'chore: update changelog' && git push origin main --tags
scripts.release:major: npm run changelog && npm version major && git add CHANGELOG.md && git commit -m 'chore: update changelog' && git push origin main --tags
scripts.check-deployment: npm run lint && npm run build && echo 'Ready for deployment!'
